mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_join_requests (room_id, user_id, invite_id) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{userId}, #{inviteId})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.user_id, r.invite_id, r.status, r.accepted_by, r.requested_at, r.accepted_at, r.undo_deadline_at, r.rejected_at, r.version, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url FROM room_join_requests r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{joinRequestId}

SELECT r.id, r.room_id, r.user_id, r.invite_id, r.status, r.accepted_by, r.requested_at, r.accepted_at, r.undo_deadline_at, r.rejected_at, r.version, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url FROM room_join_requests r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} AND r.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.requested_at ASC, r.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE room_join_requests SET status = 'ACCEPTED', accepted_by = #{acceptedBy}, accepted_at = #{acceptedAt}, undo_deadline_at = #{undoDeadlineAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{joinRequestId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT jr.id, jr.room_id, jr.user_id, jr.invite_id, jr.status, jr.accepted_by, jr.requested_at, jr.accepted_at, jr.undo_deadline_at, jr.rejected_at, jr.version, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, fr.name AS room_name, fr.status AS room_status FROM room_join_requests jr JOIN users u ON u.id = jr.user_id JOIN friendship_rooms fr ON fr.id = jr.room_id WHERE jr.user_id = #{userId} AND jr.status IN ('PENDING', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY jr.requested_at DESC
